scripts.build:sdks: bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-core' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-javascript' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-react-native' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-react' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-next' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-vue' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-svelte' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-solid' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-expo' build && bun run --filter '@goliapkg/sentori-cli' build
scripts.preflight: echo '→ lockfile drift (matches CI bun install --frozen-lockfile)' && bun install --frozen-lockfile && echo '→ github workflow lint (actionlint)' && bash scripts/check-workflows.sh && echo '→ server cargo check (catches type errors that compile in isolation)' && (cd server && cargo check --tests --quiet) && echo '→ rfc3339 serde annotations on OffsetDateTime fields (Phase 29 sub-C CI lint)' && bash scripts/check-rfc3339.sh && echo '→ web check (tsc + eslint + prettier)' && (cd web && bun run check) && echo '→ webapp check (tsc + eslint) — v0.2 dashboard, the surface docker builds' && (cd webapp && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run check) && echo '→ web test' && (cd web && bun run test) && echo '→ build all SDKs (matches CI sdk job)' && bun run build:sdks && echo '→ all SDK tests' && bun run test:sdks && echo '→ key server tests (v1_compat + regression + post_event — fast, no Postgres needed)' && (cd server && cargo test --test v1_compat --test regression --test post_event --quiet) && echo '→ error-code docs (F5 gate)' && bun scripts/check-error-docs.ts && echo '✓ preflight green — safe to push'
scripts.preflight:fast: echo '→ web check + test + sdks (skips Rust + lockfile checks for tight TS-only iterations)' && (cd web && bun run check) && (cd web && bun run test) && (cd webapp && bun run check) && bun run build:sdks && bun run test:sdks && bun scripts/check-error-docs.ts && echo '✓ fast preflight green'
